mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns are negative in >55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 5.0 percent, labor market slack signals weakening aggregate demand and corporate earnings deterioration, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 5.0 percent over a 24-month evaluation period.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer and capital demand growth, producing positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields a Rank IC below 0.01 or underperforms single-series baselines in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indices reflect strengthening manufacturing output and capacity utilization, which translates to positive short-term S&P 500 momentum during economic expansion phases.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses or loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) during mid-cycle expansion periods over a 36-month backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month increases in total nonfarm payrolls demonstrate robust labor market growth, supporting consumer spending forecasts and generating positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Payroll growth fails to predict positive forward returns in >50% of monthly observations across a 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation triggers expectations of central bank tightening and margin compression, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive in >65% of months where CPIAUCSL MoM growth exceeds 0.4 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Strong real GDP growth combined with a stable or declining federal funds rate creates a favorable growth-and-valuation environment, driving positive quarterly S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: The interaction term produces a negative or statistically insignificant coefficient in quarterly return regressions over a 4-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A breakdown in industrial production below its recent trend signals immediate supply-side contraction and inventory drawdowns, causing negative short-term equity returns during recessionary transitions.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO drops below its 6-month moving average
failure_condition: Forward 5-day returns are positive in >55% of trigger events during recessionary transition periods over a 3-year sample.
